creator: 0mp@FreeBSD.org
text:
Comment on attachment 252453
Patch restoring support for GSSAPI (9.8p1)

My testing suggests that we need to fix a couple of issue in the build process.



The first thing is that files/extra-patch-gssapi-auth2-gss.c is no longer needed. It looks like it is already applied.

The second blocker is the following build error:


    --- ssh ---
    cc -o ssh ssh.o readconf.o clientloop.o sshtty.o  sshconnect.o sshconnect2.o mux.o ssh-sk-client.o -L. -L
    openbsd-compat/  -fstack-protector-strong  -Wl,-z,relro -Wl,-z,now -Wl,-z,noexecstack -Wl,-z,retpolineplt
     -fstack-protector-strong -L/usr/local/lib -lssh -lopenbsd-compat -lldns -lutil -L/usr/local/lib -L/usr/l
    ocal/lib -lgssapi_krb5 -lcrypto  -lz
    --- sshd ---
    cc -o sshd sshd.o  platform-listen.o  servconf.o sshpty.o srclimit.o groupaccess.o auth2-methods.o  dns.o
     fatal.o compat.o utf8.o authfd.o canohost.o  ssh-sk-client.o -L. -Lopenbsd-compat/  -fstack-protector-st
    rong  -Wl,-z,relro -Wl,-z,now -Wl,-z,noexecstack -Wl,-z,retpolineplt -fstack-protector-strong -L/usr/loca
    l/lib -lssh -lopenbsd-compat -lcrypt  -lwrap -lpam -ldl -lldns -lutil -L/usr/local/lib -lcrypto  -lz
    ld: error: undefined symbol: gss_indicate_mechs
    >>> referenced by sshd.c
    >>>               sshd.o:(main)
    
    ld: error: undefined symbol: gss_release_oid_set
    >>> referenced by sshd.c
    >>>               sshd.o:(main)
    cc: error: linker command failed with exit code 1 (use -v to see invocation)
    *** [sshd] Error code 1

I am investigating what we can do about it.
